comments.body:
LGTM
We really need to get Head and Shoulders into the CI pipeline to cure the flakes.  Test restarted.

These testing farm runs are running tests from the main branch against code in this branch:
https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/9e0a7fd0-1d32-4d5c-a6f1-02507489e52c/
https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/1b2dc115-2fbb-470f-bbe6-5f78a164f65a/
https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/12a4d1b8-8622-4f20-a94c-235040563c1d/
https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/6cd3b68b-2061-4022-8a99-72b42ab1bfc2/
Those tests expect functionality and test helpers that aren't here.  I don't think they could ever pass.
